title: エリザベス女王杯にむけて

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I can't believe it! This is the worst!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: How am I supposed to calm down?! Look!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's a cool fall day, and the participants are lining
up to compete for the Queen's throne.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, word has come through that
Vodka has dropped out due to health concerns.
Who will be crowned the Queen this year?

text_block_list.name: Spectator
text_block_list.text:
For real? No way... Just when I was finally going
to watch Vodka race in person...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What was all that talk about how she was going
to be waiting for me at the Queen's Cup, then?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: She's not even at the racecourse! Ugh, this is so frustrating!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: But the worst of it is them!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The audience! It's like all they can think about is
how Vodka isn't here!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Even though they have me! Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'll show them who they should be keeping their
eyes on!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'll run a race so spectacular, it'll totally wipe
Vodka from their minds!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm not gonna let someone who's not even on the
track get center stage. I'm the number one racer
here!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Everything she wanted out of this race is mine for
the taking!
